\hypertarget{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1CellFEMDispatcher}{}\doxysection{Arcane\+Fem\+Functions\+::Cell\+FEMDispatcher Class Reference}
\label{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1CellFEMDispatcher}\index{ArcaneFemFunctions::CellFEMDispatcher@{ArcaneFemFunctions::CellFEMDispatcher}}


Provides methods based on the Dispatcher mechanism available in \mbox{\hyperlink{namespaceArcane}{Arcane}}, allowing to compute FEM methods without declaring the FE entity type (coming from PASSMO).  




{\ttfamily \#include $<$Arcane\+Fem\+Functions.\+h$>$}

\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Provides methods based on the Dispatcher mechanism available in \mbox{\hyperlink{namespaceArcane}{Arcane}}, allowing to compute FEM methods without declaring the FE entity type (coming from PASSMO).
